description: Field analysis for display-related handlers in Menace.Tactical.Skills.Effects namespace

base_info.note: All handlers inherit from SkillEventHandler. Offset 0x18 stores reference to the data object.

0x18.name: dataObject
0x18.description: Reference to the effect data object (DisplayText, ShowHUDIcon, etc.)

0x60.name: locaKey
0x60.description: Localization key for the display text

0x70.name: textColor
0x70.description: Color of the displayed text (passed to ShowDropDownText)

DisplayTextHandler.functionality: Displays localized text on unit HUD when triggered by skill events. Uses Loca.Translate to get translated text from locaKey/fallbackText, then shows as dropdown text with specified color.

0x58.name: iconType
0x58.description: Type of HUD icon to show

ShowHUDIconHandler.functionality: Controls visibility of specific HUD icons (e.g., target painted indicator). Shows icon on mission start, hides on removal. Uses UnitHUD.SetTargetPaintedIconVisibility.

0x58.name: isolatedThreshold
0x58.description: Threshold value for isolated icon visibility. Default is 2 (set in constructor). Cleared with -1 (0xFFFFFFFF) on mission finish.

ShowIsolatedIconHandler.functionality: Sets isolated icon threshold on unit HUD. On mission start, applies threshold from +0x58. On mission finish, clears by setting threshold to -1. Uses UnitHUD.SetIsolatedThreshold.

0x20.name: affectedActors
0x20.description: List of actors currently showing the icon (for cleanup)

0x58.name: iconSprite
0x58.description: Sprite to display as skill condition icon on unit HUD

enum_values.0: SingleTarget - Shows icon on single target actor
enum_values.1: AllEnemies - Uses TacticalManager.ForEachActor to show icon on all non-allied units

0x68.name: conditions
0x68.description: Array of conditions that must be satisfied for icon to show. CheckConditions iterates and evaluates each.

ShowUnitHUDIconHandler.functionality: Shows custom skill condition icons on unit HUDs. Supports single target or all-enemies targeting. Validates conditions before showing. Listens to ActiveActorChanged, MovementFinished, EntitySpawned, and Death events to update icon visibility. Uses UnitHUD.SetSkillConditionIcon.

UnitHUD.SetSkillConditionIcon.description: Sets background sprite on skill condition icon element (+0x560) and shows it

UnitHUD.SetIsolatedThreshold.description: Sets isolated threshold (+0x598). Hides icon element (+0x568) if threshold < 1

UnitHUD.SetTargetPaintedIconVisibility.description: Controls visibility of target painted icon element (+0x558)

UnitHUD.ShowDropDownText.description: Creates DropdownText element with specified text and color, adds to HUD queue (+0x578)

0xe0.name: unitHUD
0xe0.description: Reference to the Actor's UnitHUD UI component
